task_completion.description: Page 1 contains the required title and subtitle.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a page in ActivInspire with text boxes containing 'Civil Rights Movement Timeline' and '1954-1968'.

task_completion.description: Page 2 contains a horizontal timeline axis.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a horizontal line drawn across the second page of the flipchart.

task_completion.description: Page 2 contains at least 5 shape markers along the timeline.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for at least 5 distinct shapes (such as circles or rectangles) placed on or adjacent to the horizontal timeline axis.

task_completion.description: Page 2 contains text labels for the 5 required Civil Rights events.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for text boxes near the shape markers containing the words: 'Brown', 'Montgomery', 'March on Washington', 'Civil Rights Act', and 'Voting Rights Act'.

task_completion.description: The flipchart is saved with the correct filename in the correct directory.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a 'Save As' dialog showing the directory '/home/ga/Documents/Flipcharts' and the filename 'civil_rights_timeline.flipchart', or the ActivInspire window title bar displaying 'civil_rights_timeline.flipchart'.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the ActivInspire graphical user interface to create the timeline.
integrity.visual_evidence: The ActivInspire application window should be visible in the screenshots, with evidence of the agent clicking on tools, pages, and canvas areas.

integrity.description: The agent used the application's built-in tools to create the timeline rather than pasting a pre-made image.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for the selection of the Text tool, Shape tool, and Line tool in the ActivInspire toolbar during the creation process.

integrity.description: The agent saved the file using the application's menu or shortcut rather than a terminal command.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for the agent clicking 'File' -> 'Save' or 'Save As' and interacting with the graphical file explorer dialog.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The flipchart must be saved to exactly '/home/ga/Documents/Flipcharts/civil_rights_timeline.flipchart'. It must have exactly 2 pages. Page 1 must include the terms 'Civil Rights' and 'Timeline' in the title. Page 2 must have a horizontal line, at least 5 shapes, and text labels containing the keywords: 'Brown', 'Montgomery', 'March on Washington', 'Civil Rights Act', and 'Voting Rights Act'.
